title: oncidium manningianum
intro: Oncidium manningianum, also known as the yellow orchid or the Oncidium, is a species of orchid native to Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oncidium manningianum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, and it can also be found in some commercial medications and supplements.
